name: Lint & Fix
description: Run linter, analyze errors, and auto-fix them

input.command: ls package.json 2>/dev/null && echo 'node' || (ls requirements.txt setup.py pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null && echo 'python' || echo 'unknown')

if [ -f package.json ]; then npx eslint . --format compact 2>&1 | head -50; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then python3 -m flake8 . --max-line-length=120 --count 2>&1 | head -50; elif command -v shellcheck &>/dev/null; then find . -name '*.sh' -maxdepth 2 | head -10 | xargs shellcheck 2>&1 | head -50; else echo 'No linter detected'; fi

steps.prompt:
Fix these lint errors. Only fix real issues, don't change logic:

{{lint}}

input.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then npx eslint . --format compact 2>&1 | tail -5; elif [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python3 -m flake8 . --count 2>&1 | tail -5; else echo 'done'; fi
